summary: Completed backend API testing for WaMerce e-commerce management system. All 17 tests passed. Shopify sync, scheduler, 1688 integration, and fulfillment pipeline APIs are fully functional.

minor.issue: Returns 520 (Cloudflare) instead of 404 for non-existent stores

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are working correctly with proper error handling
Scheduler is running with hourly Shopify sync for all stores
1688 integration has 32 products synced from order history
Fulfillment pipeline is ready but has 0 orders (expected for new feature)

Key endpoints tested: 1) Shopify sync works for ashmiaa (6 orders), tnvcollectionpk (57 orders), tnvcollection (33 orders). 2) Scheduler running with hourly Shopify sync. 3) 1688 catalog has 32 products. 4) Fulfillment pipeline has 0 orders (new feature). 5) 50 pending purchase orders available for fulfillment automation.
